TaskDescription: Visual ERP copy-spelling task using a modified 6x6 grid extended with 10 # symbols as visual blanks, using flexible highlighting scheme with two interleaved sequences to enable unsupervised learning methods (EM, LLP, MIX) Trial duration: 17.0s, ISI: 150.0ms, SOA: 250.0ms.
Instructions: copy-spelling task - spell German sentence 'Franzy jagt im Taxi quer durch das'
InstitutionAddress: Brain State Decoding Lab, University of Freiburg, Freiburg, GERMANY
